summary: postinstall downloads and executes opaque binary from bare-IP endpoint with TLS verification disabled
details: The package's declared postinstall script (platform-bootstrap.mjs) fetches a tgz archive from the hardcoded bare-IP endpoint https://218.90.133.98:4443/onecode_tgz/, extracts an executable into node_modules, chmods it 0755, and hardlinks it as bin/.onecode which the package CLI subsequently invokes. The download is performed via https.get with rejectUnauthorized: false, disabling TLS certificate validation, and redirects are followed with the same disabled TLS. No hash or signature is checked against the fetched bytes. The destination is a bare IPv4 address unaffiliated with any publisher domain, and any on-path attacker or operator of that IP can serve arbitrary payload bytes that will be executed on the installer's machine at npm install time.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
